summary: Created idempotent migration file adding age (INTEGER, nullable) and color_markings (VARCHAR(255), nullable) columns to the pets table. Added db:migrate:pet-age-color and db:migrate:pet-age-color:dev scripts to package.json. Added the migration step to both the production deploy sequence and the PR environment migration chain in deploy.yml, appended after the existing db:migrate:soft-delete step in both locations.
notes_for_reviewer: The deploy.yml and package.json had already been updated since the plan was written — soft-delete migration was present but not documented in the plan. The new pet-age-color migration was appended after soft-delete in both files to preserve order.
TypeScript compilation passed clean with no errors.
